An elevator to all three floors of unit, and
finished lower level that includes a media room,
workout room, and recreation room and wet bar.

ï¿½

6.ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Deposit

By February 24, 2006 a $1995 deposit and approval of
a unit reservation form will be necessary to hold
the unit until the Purchase Agreement is signed.ï¿½
This initial deposit is payable to Market Street
South, LLC and can be delivered to 1 Keswick, New
Albany, Ohio 43054.

ï¿½

At the signing of the Purchase Agreement an
additional deposit equal to 2% of the Purchase Price
will be required.

ï¿½

Upon acceptance of the interior finish selections,
an additional deposit equal to 3% of the Purchase
Price will be required.

ï¿½

7.ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Finishes

Selection of finishes is expected within 10 days of
Purchase Agreement signing.

ï¿½

8.ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Change Order

Duffy Homes is developing a drawing for the change
of the ownerï¿½s bath from a double shower to a
single
shower and tub.ï¿½ Upon completion, Duffy will
submit
drawings to the Buyer for approval.

ï¿½

9.ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Construction Completion

Completion of construction is anticipated to take
approximately three months from Duffyï¿½s acceptance
of the final selection of interior finishes. ï¿½ï¿½

ï¿½

ï¿½

ï¿½

ï¿½

ï¿½

more information please call me.

ï¿½

Bill
